title: Fix Copilot hooks: move from .copilot/hooks.json to .github/hooks/
description:
WHY: The syllago provider was updated (commit fb29b41) to discover Copilot hooks from .github/hooks/ directory. The kitchen sink has a single file at .copilot/hooks.json.

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (P1 item 5)

WHAT TO FIX:
- Create .github/hooks/ directory
- Move .copilot/hooks.json → .github/hooks/pre-tool-use.json (or appropriate name)
- Add version: 1 top-level field if missing (per Copilot hooks spec)
- Delete .copilot/hooks.json
- Update test scripts and golden files

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- .github/hooks/ contains valid hook file(s)
- .copilot/hooks.json deleted
- test_discovery.sh copilot passes
- Separate validation agent confirms structure matches syllago provider expectations

TESTING: Run tests/run.sh

title: Fix Codex agent golden: wrong tool names (Copilot names instead of Codex)
description:
WHY: The syllago toolmap was updated (commit 0eab6c9) so Codex has its own tool mappings. The kitchen sink golden still uses Copilot tool names.

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (P0 item 3)

WHAT TO FIX:
- Golden file for codex agent has tools = ['view', 'rg', 'glob', 'shell']
- Should be tools = ['read_file', 'grep_files', 'list_dir', 'shell'] per toolmap.go Codex entries
- Also verify the developer_instructions field is used (not nested [agent.instructions].content)

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- Golden file has correct Codex tool names
- Golden uses developer_instructions (flat) not nested instructions
- test_convert.sh agent→codex passes
- Separate validation agent confirms golden matches syllago's renderCodexAgent output

TESTING: Run tests/test_convert.sh and verify codex agent test passes

title: Fix Copilot agent: rename to <name>.agent.md convention
description:
WHY: Research shows Copilot agents use <name>.agent.md naming convention. The fixture uses code-reviewer.md.

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (P3 item 15)

WHAT TO FIX:
- Rename .copilot/agents/code-reviewer.md → .copilot/agents/code-reviewer.agent.md
- Or move to .github/agents/code-reviewer.agent.md (preferred Copilot location)
- Update golden files and test scripts

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- Agent file uses .agent.md suffix
- Preferably at .github/agents/ path
- Separate validation agent confirms naming matches Copilot research

TESTING: Run tests/run.sh

title: Add Cursor fixtures: skills, commands, hooks, MCP, agents
description:
WHY: Cursor was expanded from rules-only to 6 content types in syllago (commit 4339cc4). The kitchen sink only has rules fixtures for Cursor, leaving 5 content types untested.

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (P2 item 7)

WHAT TO ADD:
- .cursor/skills/greeting/SKILL.md — skill with name, description frontmatter
- .cursor/commands/summarize.md — command matching other providers
- .cursor/hooks.json — hooks with version:1, event entries
- .cursor/mcp.json — MCP config with mcpServers key
- .cursor/agents/code-reviewer.md — agent with name, description, model, readonly frontmatter
- Golden files for each new fixture
- Test entries in test_discovery.sh, test_add.sh, test_convert.sh, test_install.sh

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- All 6 Cursor content types have fixtures
- All Cursor test entries pass
- Fixtures use correct Cursor-native formats (not Claude Code format)
- Separate validation agent confirms each fixture matches syllago's Cursor converter output

TESTING: Run tests/run.sh — all Cursor tests pass

title: Fix Windsurf .windsurfrules: remove undocumented description field
description:
WHY: The .windsurfrules fixture has a 'description' field in frontmatter, but research shows Windsurf rules only support 'trigger' and 'globs' fields.

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (P3 item 14)

WHAT TO FIX:
- Remove description from .windsurfrules frontmatter (or verify it's harmlessly ignored)
- Only keep trigger and globs fields

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- .windsurfrules frontmatter only contains documented fields
- Separate validation agent confirms format matches Windsurf research

TESTING: Run tests/run.sh

title: Fix Kiro agent: JSON → markdown with YAML frontmatter
description:
WHY: The syllago converter was updated to render Kiro agents as markdown with YAML frontmatter (commit 1b42e93 in syllago repo). The kitchen sink fixture is still JSON, causing test_convert.sh agent→kiro to fail.

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (P0 item 1)

WHAT TO FIX:
- Convert .kiro/agents/code-reviewer.json to .kiro/agents/code-reviewer.md (markdown with YAML frontmatter)
- Frontmatter fields: name, description, tools (using Kiro tool names from toolmap: read, grep, glob, shell), model
- Body: the prompt content from the JSON 'prompt' field
- Update tests/golden/kiro/agents/code-reviewer.md (rename from .json)
- Fix the triple 'read' bug in tools list → should be [read, grep, glob, shell]

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- .kiro/agents/code-reviewer.md exists with valid YAML frontmatter
- .kiro/agents/code-reviewer.json is deleted
- Golden file updated to match new format
- test_convert.sh agent→kiro passes
- test_discovery.sh kiro passes
- Separate validation agent confirms format matches syllago's renderKiroAgent output

TESTING: Run tests/run.sh and verify kiro-related tests pass

title: Update all provider specs against detailed research docs
description:
WHY: The docs/provider-specs/ files are brief summaries written before the detailed provider research. Several are stale (Kiro agents=JSON, Codex agent nesting, Copilot paths). The detailed research at /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/ is now the authoritative source.

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (Provider Specs Audit section)

WHAT TO FIX:
- Kiro spec: agents are markdown, not JSON
- Codex spec: agents use flat developer_instructions, not nested [agent.instructions]
- Copilot spec: MCP is mcp-config.json, agents at .github/agents/<name>.agent.md
- OpenCode spec: skills path is plural
- All specs: cross-reference against research docs for accuracy

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- All 11 provider spec files are accurate per research
- Separate validation agent compares each spec against corresponding research doc

TESTING: Manual review

title: Fix provider specs: Claude Code rules use paths, not alwaysApply/globs
description:
WHY: The docs/provider-specs/claude-code.md incorrectly says Claude Code rules use alwaysApply and globs frontmatter fields. Research shows Claude Code .claude/rules/*.md files use a 'paths' field, not alwaysApply/globs (those are Cursor/syllago-canonical fields).

AUDIT REF: /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/audit/kitchen-sink-repo.md (P3 item 13)

WHAT TO FIX:
- Update docs/provider-specs/claude-code.md to correctly document paths field
- Clarify that the fixture .claude/rules/security.md uses syllago canonical format (alwaysApply/globs) which is converted to native paths on install
- Review all provider specs against the detailed research at /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago/docs/providers/

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- Claude Code spec correctly documents native paths field
- Distinction between canonical format and native format is clear
- Separate validation agent confirms spec matches research docs

TESTING: Manual review
